description: Document in a chancery hand, wide line spacing, parts of four lines preserved from somewhere toward the middle of the page top to bottom. Generous right margin and left margin preserved intact to judge by the word-stacking. Text has a slash through it, presumably when it was discarded (and then reused for the text on verso; see separate entry).
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי בערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
